query: low resolution pixelated mosaic blocky digital image
message: sub:digital_artifacts/pixelation — anti_aesthetic — pixel mosaic, blocky low-res, color-cell grids

response.objective_caption: A close-up photograph of a woven textile with a blue and white geometric pattern. The design consists of repeating dark blue diamonds and four-pointed stars separated by intersecting diagonal white lines, set against a lighter blue background. The fabric structure shows an interlaced thread texture with alternating color blocks forming a symmetrical lattice arrangement.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A close-up photograph of a woven textile with a blue and white geometric pattern consisting of repeating dark blue diamonds and four-pointed stars separated by intersecting diagonal white lines. The image exhibits a lack of fine detail, with smeared and pixelated textures causing the woven thread structure and sharp geometric edges to dissolve into a coarse, low-resolution appearance.
